title: Station class document
description: A reusable station design: its concourse deck plan (deck-plan format v3, docs/deckplan-format.md) plus docking characteristics (dock_radius, crane). Worlds reference a station class by id and carry only per-instance placement/economy (issue #30). Derived from the Gleam decoders in server/src/dh_server/stationclass.gleam (station_class_decoder) and server/src/dh_server/deckplan.gleam (decoder, embedded at the top level via decode.then) — those decoders are the source of truth; this schema is documentation and a typo-catcher. additionalProperties is false at every object level even though the decoders ignore unknown fields, precisely so this schema catches typos. Berths are NOT authored here: they derive from the concourse's Q docking-port glyphs (issue #31).

dock_radius.description: decode.float: JSON value must have a decimal point; a bare integer is rejected.

crane.description: Optional field (decode.optional_field, default false). The fast-handling path: container hulls can only trade where crane is true.

decks.description: The concourse deck plan (usually a single deck). Consoles (b=broker), the spawn tile (s), and berths (Q docking ports) are authored as center glyphs and derived at load.

consoles.description: Optional. Normally derived from the grid glyphs; the server re-emits a derived list over the wire but hand-authored docs omit it.

grid.description: 3*height rows of 3*width chars: each tile is a 3x3 block (centre = floor/void/stairs/console/dock/spawn; N/E/S/W edge-mids = wall/door/fixture). See docs/deckplan-format.md and server/glyphs.json.
